name: TDEE Calculator
seo_description: Use our free tdee calculator to quickly estimate tdee, bmr based on weight, height, age. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate TDEE for 75kg, 175cm, 30 years, male, moderate exercise.
result_context: The TDEE es calories to mantener weight current; reduce 500 kcal/day to perder ~0.5kg/week.
formula_display: BMR (Mifflin) → TDEE = BMR × factor actividad (1.2 a 1.9)
steps: Ingresa weight, height, edad and género
Select nivel of actividad of The lista
Calculate BMR with formula Mifflin-St Jeor
Multiply BMR per factor of actividad to TDEE
mistakes: Sobreestimar nivel of actividad (The mayoría es more sedentario of lo que cree)
No registrar cambios of weight semanalmente (ajustar TDEE si no cambia)
Seguir TDEE ciegamente without escuchar señales of hambre/saciedad
desc: Free online tdee calculator. Enter weight and height to get instant results.
